title: Turkish Menemen Scramble
description: A Turkish-inspired twist on the classic scrambled eggs, featuring juicy sausage and fresh vegetables.
instructions: 1. Preheat a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Remove the sausage from its casing and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until browned, about 5 minutes.
3. Add the chopped onion, bell pepper, and tomato to the skillet and cook until the vegetables are softened, about 5 minutes.
4. Push the sausage and vegetables to one side of the skillet.
5. Crack the eggs into the other side of the skillet and scramble them until they are cooked to your liking.
6. Mix the eggs with the sausage and vegetables.
7. Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
8. Garnish with chopped fresh parsley, if desired.
